products.name: Battery Packs for Robotics / AGV (UGV, AMR, AUV, USV)
products.descriptor: Custom battery packs for AGVs, AMRs, UGVs, AUVs, and unmanned surface vehicles

evidence.snippet:
Robotics & AGV Battery Pack Manufacturing
=========================================

We manufacturer battery packs for a wide range of robots including; Automated Mobile Robots (AMR), Automated Guided Vehicles (AGV), Unmanned Guided Vehicle (UGV), Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV), Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) and Unmanned Surface Vehicles).

products.name: Battery Packs for AUV (Autonomous Underwater Vehicles)
products.descriptor: Custom lithium battery packs for autonomous underwater vehicles

evidence.snippet: The robotics market is a vibrant industry where battery-powered equipment plays a pivotal role in driving efficiency, productivity, and innovation across various applications. From Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) navigating warehouse floors to Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) inspecting the sea bed for use in the [marine industry](https://www.alexandertechnologies.com/industries/marine-battery-packs/), the versatility of robotic technologies is growing continuously.
*   A dedicated project team ensures an end-to-end solution for the design, testing, manufacturing and supply of battery packs for robots, cobots, AUVs, AGVs and autonomous mobile robots (AMR).

unresolved_questions: Test & Measurement Battery Packs: the dedicated industry page (industries/test-measurement) was skipped_class_budget; product was cited from the design page's industry list instead — product detail and sub-applications not fully confirmed.

Build-to-Print Battery Pack Manufacturing: the manufacturing capabilities page (our-manufacturing-capabilities) was skipped_budget; full manufacturing service detail not confirmed from a dedicated page.
Battery Packs for Military Vehicles: listed as a sub-industry on the Aviation & UAV page but no dedicated page was fetched; additional military-specific specs (e.g. MIL-STD compliance) unknown.
Battery Packs for Agricultural Drones and Delivery Drones: also sub-industry entries only; no dedicated pages fetched.
Battery Packs for AUV: no dedicated AUV page fetched; cited from Robotics/AGV page which broadly covers AUVs.

fetch_requests.reason: Dedicated Test & Measurement industry page skipped; needed to confirm product scope, sub-applications, and any compliance claims for Test & Measurement Battery Packs.
